name: pie-players
description: PIE players monorepo (assessment + item players + tooling)

scripts.test:e2e:section-player: export SECTION_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5300); bun run build:e2e:section-player && bunx playwright test --config packages/section-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:section-player:tts-ssml: export SECTION_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5300); bun run build:e2e:section-player && bunx playwright test packages/section-player/tests/section-player-tts-ssml.spec.ts --config packages/section-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:section-player:tts-generated-ss: export SECTION_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5300); bun run build:e2e:section-player && bunx playwright test packages/section-player/tests/section-player-tts-generated-ssml.spec.ts --config packages/section-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:section-player:critical: export SECTION_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5300); bun run build:e2e:section-player && bunx playwright test packages/section-player/tests/section-player-tts-ssml.spec.ts packages/section-player/tests/section-player-tts-generated-ssml.spec.ts packages/section-player/tests/section-player-event-panel.spec.ts packages/section-player/tests/section-player-session-hydrate-db.spec.ts --config packages/section-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:item-player: export ITEM_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5400); bun run build:e2e:item-player && bunx playwright test --config packages/item-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:backend-demo: export BACKEND_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5600); bun run build:e2e:section-player && bun run build:e2e:item-player && bunx playwright test --config packages/item-player/playwright.backend.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:assessment-player: export ASSESSMENT_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5500); bun run build:e2e:assessment-player && bunx playwright test --config packages/assessment-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:item-player:multiple-choice: export ITEM_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5400); bun run build:e2e:item-player && bunx playwright test packages/item-player/tests/item-player-multiple-choice.spec.ts --config packages/item-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:item-player:critical: export ITEM_DEMOS_PORT=$(bun ./scripts/get-free-port.mjs 5400); bun run build:e2e:item-player && bunx playwright test packages/item-player/tests/item-player-multiple-choice.spec.ts packages/item-player/tests/item-player-ebsr.spec.ts --config packages/item-player/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:a11y:critical: bun run test:e2e:section-player:tts-ssml && bun run test:e2e:item-player:multiple-choice && bun run test:e2e:assessment-player
scripts.test:e2e:all: bun run test:e2e:section-player && bun run test:e2e:item-player && bun run test:e2e:backend-demo && bun run test:e2e:assessment-player
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:svelte
scripts.lint:all: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.verify:pre-commit: bun run check:changeset-patch-only && bun run check:local-pr-gate && bun run check:deps && bun run check:package-metadata && bun run check:svelte-runtime-deps && bun run check:custom-elements && bun run check:ce-define-safety && bun run check:speech-composition-purity && bun run check:source-exports && bun run check:consumer-boundaries && bun run check:scripts && bun run lint:biome && bun run check
scripts.verify:ci-lint-typecheck: bun run check:local-pr-gate && bun run check:deps && bun run check:package-metadata && bun run check:svelte-runtime-deps && bun run check:custom-elements && bun run check:ce-define-safety && bun run check:speech-composition-purity && bun run check:scripts && bun run build && bun run check:player-tool-boundaries && bun run check:publint && bun run check:types-publish && bun run check:pack-integrity && bun run check:node-consumer-imports && bun run check:consumer-boundaries && bun run lint:all
scripts.verify:local-pr: bun run check:changeset-patch-only && bun run verify:ci-lint-typecheck && bun run test:e2e:section-player:critical && bun run test:e2e:item-player:critical && bun run test:e2e:assessment-player
scripts.preview:item: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/item-demos preview
scripts.dev:backend: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/backend-demos dev
scripts.preview:backend: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/backend-demos preview
scripts.dev:section:cdn: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/section-demos dev:cdn
scripts.dev:section:cdn-debug: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/section-demos dev:cdn-debug
scripts.preview:section: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/section-demos preview
scripts.preview:assessment: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/assessment-demos preview
scripts.preview:lti: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/lti-demos preview
scripts.dev:docs: dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/docs dev
scripts.preview:docs: NODE_ENV=production bun run --cwd apps/docs build && dotenvx run -- bun run --cwd apps/docs preview
scripts.check:docs: bun run check:docs:links && bun run check:docs:imports && bun run check:docs:publishable-packages && bun run --cwd apps/docs check && bun run --cwd apps/docs build
scripts.verify:publish: bun run build && bun run check:changeset-patch-only && bun run check:fixed-versioning && bun run check:package-metadata && bun run check:svelte-runtime-deps && bun run check:custom-elements && bun run check:ce-define-safety && bun run check:publint && bun run check:types-publish && bun run check:pack-integrity:real && bun run check:deps && bun run check:consumer-boundaries && bun run check:ce-consumer-contract && bun run check:node-consumer-imports && bun run check:bundle-safety && bun run check:math-rendering-version && bun run check:engine-core-purity && bun run check:speech-composition-purity && bun run check:scripts
scripts.release:with-version: bun run check:changeset-patch-only && bun ./scripts/create-temporary-release-changeset.mjs && bun run version && bun run restore:workspace-ranges && bun run check:npm-auth && bun run verify:publish && bun run test && bun run release && bun run restore:workspace-ranges
scripts.release: dotenvx run -f .env -- sh -c "bun run build && bun run --cwd tools/cli build && bun ./scripts/changeset-publish-resolved-workspaces.mjs && bun scripts/preloaded-player/publish-changed.mjs --all"
scripts.release:label: bun ./scripts/create-release-label.mjs
scripts.pack:local: bun run build && bun run --cwd tools/cli build && bun ./scripts/pack-local.mjs
